name: Quake Ports — Apple Vision Pro
subtitle: Quake 1, 2 & 3 in 2D and stereoscopic 3D
description: Pristine Apple Vision Pro ports of Quake, Quake II, and Quake III Arena, with a world-locked stereoscopic 3D mode. Bring your own game data.

apps.name: Quake
apps.subtitle: Quake for iPhone & Vision Pro
apps.localizedDescription: The full Quake campaign, mission packs, QuakeC mods, and — on Apple Vision Pro — a stereoscopic 3D mode. Built on vkQuake. Ships with no game content; you supply your own Quake files.

versions.localizedDescription:
**Quake for iPhone, iPad, and Apple Vision Pro** — a native port of [vkQuake](https://github.com/Novum/vkQuake) (Vulkan via MoltenVK), including a world-locked **stereoscopic 3D mode** on Apple Vision Pro.

Ships with **no game content** — you supply your own Quake files (2021 re-release recommended; original `pak0`/`pak1` also works).

### What's fixed in 1.0.2
- **The app icon now actually shows in SideStore/AltStore's "My Apps" list.** The 1.0.1 attempt didn't fix it — those tools resolve the installed icon by looking up a specific image *name* inside the app's compiled asset catalog, and the name they ask for wasn't present. 1.0.2 bakes that exact name into the catalog, so the real icon appears in the installed-apps list (it was always fine on the Home Screen and in the source).

If you already have the app installed, SideStore/AltStore will offer 1.0.2 as an update once it refreshes the source.

### Install via SideStore source (recommended — auto-updates)
Add one URL to [SideStore](https://sidestore.io) / [AltStore](https://altstore.io) and the app installs *and updates itself* when new versions ship:
- **iPhone / iPad:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-ios.json`
- **Apple Vision Pro:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-visionos.json`

These are shared sources — they also carry Quake II and Quake III. On **Apple Vision Pro**, first install SideStore onto the headset with [iloader](https://github.com/rebelancap/iloader/releases#release-visionos), then add the source in SideStore.

### Or download and sideload manually
- **`vkQuake-1.0.2-iOS.ipa`** — iPhone / iPad (iOS 16+)
- **`vkQuake-1.0.2-visionOS.ipa`** — Apple Vision Pro (visionOS 2+)

Full instructions in the [README](https://github.com/rebelancap/vkQuake-ios#readme).

### What's in it
- Full single-player campaign with saves, both mission packs, and the re-release episodes (Dimension of the Past, Dimension of the Machine)
- QuakeC mods — drop a mod folder in and launch it from a generated menu (Arcane Dimensions, Copper, Alkaline, …)
- Music, all sound, demos, and the full menu/console by touch or controller
- Game controllers, on-screen touch sticks, and gyro aim
- 60 / 120 Hz (ProMotion), in-app settings that persist
- **Apple Vision Pro:** free-resizing 2D window, plus a 3D mode — the game on a world-locked stereoscopic panel with live-tunable screen size, distance, depth, and room dimming

GPLv2, matching upstream vkQuake. QUAKE © id Software.

**Quake for iPhone, iPad, and Apple Vision Pro** — a native port of [vkQuake](https://github.com/Novum/vkQuake) (Vulkan via MoltenVK), including a world-locked **stereoscopic 3D mode** on Apple Vision Pro.

Ships with **no game content** — you supply your own Quake files (2021 re-release recommended; original `pak0`/`pak1` also works).

The app now ships a proper compiled asset catalog, which is what those tools read for the installed icon. Update to 1.0.1 and the real icon appears.

If you already have 1.0.0 installed, SideStore/AltStore will offer 1.0.1 as an update automatically once it refreshes the source.

### Or download and sideload manually
- **`vkQuake-1.0.1-iOS.ipa`** — iPhone / iPad (iOS 16+)

Full instructions in the [README](https://github.com/rebelancap/vkQuake-ios#readme).

### What's in it
- Full single-player campaign with saves, both mission packs, and the re-release episodes (Dimension of the Past, Dimension of the Machine)
- QuakeC mods — drop a mod folder in and launch it from a generated menu (Arcane Dimensions, Copper, Alkaline, …)

apps.name: Quake II
apps.subtitle: Quake II for iPhone & Vision Pro
apps.localizedDescription: Quake II, including the re-release content, with an Apple Vision Pro 3D mode. Built on q2repro. Bring your own Quake II game data.

versions.localizedDescription:
**Quake II for iPhone and Apple Vision Pro** — a native port of [q2repro](https://github.com/Paril/q2repro) (Q2PRO with 2023 re-release support, rendering on Metal via ANGLE), including a world-locked **stereoscopic 3D mode** on Apple Vision Pro.

Ships with **no game content** — you supply your own Quake II files (2023 re-release recommended; an original `baseq2` also works).

### Fixed in 1.0.3 (visionOS)
- **Exiting 3D reliably restores the window to its pre-3D size.** The restore could be silently dropped in some flows (exiting via the Digital Crown, closing the control card while in 3D, or the app relaunching while parked), leaving the window stuck at the small card size until manually resized. The window now snaps back to exactly the size it had before entering 3D, in every exit flow — and that size survives relaunches.

The iPhone build is unchanged apart from the version bump.

### Install via SideStore source (recommended — auto-updates)
Add one URL to [SideStore](https://sidestore.io) / [AltStore](https://altstore.io) and Quake II installs *and updates itself* when new versions ship:
- **iPhone / iPad:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-ios.json`
- **Apple Vision Pro:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-visionos.json`

These are shared sources — they also carry Quake (vkQuake) and Quake III. On **Apple Vision Pro**, first install SideStore onto the headset with [iloader](https://github.com/rebelancap/iloader/releases#release-visionos), then add the source in SideStore.

### Or download and sideload manually
- **`Quake2-1.0.3-iOS.ipa`** — iPhone (iOS 15+)
- **`Quake2-1.0.3-visionOS.ipa`** — Apple Vision Pro (visionOS 26+), 2D + 3D in one app

Full instructions in the [README](https://github.com/rebelancap/q2repro-ios#readme).

GPLv2, matching upstream Q2PRO. QUAKE II © id Software.

**Quake II for iPhone and Apple Vision Pro** — a native port of [q2repro](https://github.com/Paril/q2repro) (Q2PRO with 2023 re-release support, rendering on Metal via ANGLE), including a world-locked **stereoscopic 3D mode** on Apple Vision Pro.

Ships with **no game content** — you supply your own Quake II files (2023 re-release recommended; an original `baseq2` also works).

### Fixed in 1.0.2
- **The app icon now shows in SideStore's My Apps list** (and anywhere else that reads per-device icon renditions). The icon set was single-size before; it now ships the full multi-size set.

No gameplay changes — both builds are otherwise identical to 1.0.1.

### Install via SideStore source (recommended — auto-updates)
Add one URL to [SideStore](https://sidestore.io) / [AltStore](https://altstore.io) and Quake II installs *and updates itself* when new versions ship:
- **iPhone / iPad:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-ios.json`
- **Apple Vision Pro:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-visionos.json`

These are shared sources — they also carry Quake (vkQuake) and Quake III. On **Apple Vision Pro**, first install SideStore onto the headset with [iloader](https://github.com/rebelancap/iloader/releases#release-visionos), then add the source in SideStore.

### Or download and sideload manually
- **`Quake2-1.0.2-iOS.ipa`** — iPhone (iOS 15+)
- **`Quake2-1.0.2-visionOS.ipa`** — Apple Vision Pro (visionOS 26+), 2D + 3D in one app

Full instructions in the [README](https://github.com/rebelancap/q2repro-ios#readme).

GPLv2, matching upstream Q2PRO. QUAKE II © id Software.

**Quake II for iPhone and Apple Vision Pro** — a native port of [q2repro](https://github.com/Paril/q2repro) (Q2PRO with 2023 re-release support, rendering on Metal via ANGLE), including a world-locked **stereoscopic 3D mode** on Apple Vision Pro.

Ships with **no game content** — you supply your own Quake II files (2023 re-release recommended; an original `baseq2` also works).

### Fixed in 1.0.1 (visionOS hotfix)
- **Sound now resumes when you reopen the window.** Closing the 2D window and coming back left the app silent until a full relaunch — the audio session is now suspended and restarted properly with the window (your config is also saved at that moment).
- **The app's folder in the Files app shows the Quake II icon** instead of a blank one.

The iPhone build is unchanged apart from the version bump.

### Install via SideStore source (recommended — auto-updates)
Add one URL to [SideStore](https://sidestore.io) / [AltStore](https://altstore.io) and Quake II installs *and updates itself* when new versions ship:
- **iPhone / iPad:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-ios.json`
- **Apple Vision Pro:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-visionos.json`

These are shared sources — they also carry Quake (vkQuake) and Quake III. On **Apple Vision Pro**, first install SideStore onto the headset with [iloader](https://github.com/rebelancap/iloader/releases#release-visionos), then add the source in SideStore.

### Or download and sideload manually
- **`Quake2-1.0.1-iOS.ipa`** — iPhone (iOS 15+)
- **`Quake2-1.0.1-visionOS.ipa`** — Apple Vision Pro (visionOS 26+), 2D + 3D in one app

Full instructions in the [README](https://github.com/rebelancap/q2repro-ios#readme).

GPLv2, matching upstream Q2PRO. QUAKE II © id Software.

**Quake II for iPhone and Apple Vision Pro** — a native port of [q2repro](https://github.com/Paril/q2repro) (Q2PRO with 2023 re-release support, rendering on Metal via ANGLE), including a world-locked **stereoscopic 3D mode** on Apple Vision Pro.

Ships with **no game content** — you supply your own Quake II files (2023 re-release recommended; an original `baseq2` also works).

### Install via SideStore source (recommended — auto-updates)
Add one URL to [SideStore](https://sidestore.io) / [AltStore](https://altstore.io) and Quake II installs *and updates itself* when new versions ship:
- **iPhone / iPad:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-ios.json`
- **Apple Vision Pro:** `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-visionos.json`

These are shared sources — they also carry Quake (vkQuake) and Quake III. On **Apple Vision Pro**, first install SideStore onto the headset with [iloader](https://github.com/rebelancap/iloader/releases#release-visionos), then add the source in SideStore.

### Or download and sideload manually
- **`Quake2-1.0.0-iOS.ipa`** — iPhone (iOS 15+)
- **`Quake2-1.0.0-visionOS.ipa`** — Apple Vision Pro (visionOS 26+), 2D + 3D in one app

Full instructions in the [README](https://github.com/rebelancap/q2repro-ios#readme).

### What's in it
- Full single-player campaign with saves; the re-release episodes and expansions (*The Reckoning*, *Ground Zero*, *Call of the Machine*, *Quake II 64*) with their intro cinematics; classic mission packs
- **Action Quake II** compiled in; classic mods via the generated Mods menu
- Music, cinematics, all sound, demo playback, and the full menu/console by touch or controller
- Game controllers with the re-release layout (weapon wheel included), on-screen touch sticks, gyro aim
- 60 / 120 Hz (ProMotion), in-app settings that persist; Q2PRO multiplayer with a server browser
- **Apple Vision Pro:** free-resizing 2D window, plus a 3D mode — the game on a world-locked stereoscopic panel with live-tunable screen size, distance, depth, crosshair distance, and room dimming; spatial audio anchored at the screen

GPLv2, matching upstream Q2PRO. QUAKE II © id Software.

apps.name: Quake III Arena
apps.subtitle: Quake III Arena for iPhone & Vision Pro
apps.localizedDescription: Quake III Arena with bots and multiplayer, plus an Apple Vision Pro 3D mode. Built on quake3e. Bring your own Quake III game data.

versions.localizedDescription:
Maintenance release — a blank-icon fix plus the latest upstream
[Quake3e](https://github.com/ec-/Quake3e) engine.

## What's new in 1.0.1

- **Fixed the blank app icon** in SideStore / AltStore's "My Apps" list. The app now
  ships a compiled icon asset catalog, so the Quake III icon shows correctly once you
  update or reinstall.
- **Updated to the latest Quake3e engine**, picking up upstream fixes: a network
  packet-queue timeout correction, a bot-AI (AAS) regression fix, a Vulkan depth-write
  rendering-correctness fix, and assorted cleanups.

Everything from 1.0.0 is unchanged — you keep your settings and data.

## Install

**The easy way — the auto-updating source (SideStore / AltStore).** Add the shared
Quake-ports source, then install Quake III from it; future updates appear automatically:

- iPhone / iPad: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-ios.json`
- Apple Vision Pro: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-visionos.json`

On Apple Vision Pro, first install SideStore onto the headset with
[iloader](https://github.com/rebelancap/iloader/releases#release-visionos), then add the
source in SideStore. (iloader installs SideStore itself — apps are then installed and
kept refreshed by SideStore.)

**Or manually:** download the IPA below and sideload it with
[SideStore](https://sidestore.io), [AltStore](https://altstore.io), or
[Sideloadly](https://sideloadly.io):

- `Quake3-1.0.1-iOS.ipa` — iPhone / iPad (iOS 16+)
- `Quake3-1.0.1-visionOS.ipa` — Apple Vision Pro (visionOS 2+)

**You bring the game:** copy your own `baseq3` folder (retail `pak0.pk3` from Steam,
GOG, or CD) into the app at first launch or via the Files app. Nothing copyrighted
ships in these IPAs. See the [README](https://github.com/rebelancap/quake3e-ios#readme)
for setup, controls, and FAQ.

First public release — Quake III Arena for iPhone and Apple Vision Pro, built on
[Quake3e](https://github.com/ec-/Quake3e)'s Vulkan renderer running natively on Metal.

**You bring the game:** copy your own `baseq3` folder (retail `pak0.pk3` from Steam,
GOG, or CD) into the app at first launch or via the Files app. Nothing copyrighted
ships in these IPAs. See the [README](https://github.com/rebelancap/quake3e-ios#readme)
for setup, controls, and FAQ.

## Install

**The easy way — the auto-updating source (SideStore / AltStore).** Add the shared
Quake-ports source, then install Quake III from it; future updates appear automatically:

- iPhone / iPad: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-ios.json`
- Apple Vision Pro: `https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rebelancap/quake-ports/main/apps-visionos.json`

On Apple Vision Pro, first install SideStore onto the headset with
[iloader](https://github.com/rebelancap/iloader/releases#release-visionos), then add the
source in SideStore. (iloader installs SideStore itself — apps are then installed and
kept refreshed by SideStore.)

**Or manually:** download the IPA below and sideload it with
[SideStore](https://sidestore.io), [AltStore](https://altstore.io), or
[Sideloadly](https://sideloadly.io):

- `Quake3-1.0.0-iOS.ipa` — iPhone / iPad (iOS 16+)
- `Quake3-1.0.0-visionOS.ipa` — Apple Vision Pro (visionOS 2+)

## Highlights

- Locked **120 fps** on ProMotion at native resolution
- Full single-player skirmish + bot ladder, cinematics, music, demos
- **Internet & LAN multiplayer** — live server browser, direct connect, automatic
  map downloads
- **Mods as drop-in data** — CPMA, OSP, defrag, Urban Terror, Team Arena
- Game controllers (rebindable), touch sticks, gyro aim, persistent settings
- **Apple Vision Pro:** resizable 2D window + stereoscopic **3D mode** — the game on
  a world-locked panel with real depth (both eyes rendered every frame), live-tunable
  screen size / distance / stereo depth / crosshair distance, surroundings dimming,
  and audio anchored to the screen
